t.t-if: not o or not 'company_id' in o

tr.span: Head Office: P.O Box 19085, Dubai, UAE

span.t-esc: l.final_cost * sum([tx.amount for tx in l.taxes_id])

p.strong: This is a system generated document , company's stamp and signature is not required.
